Notes:
Fill in ContentUriBase and RequiredUamiResourceId.
OutputPaths controls where build/hydration scripts write artifacts. No build outputs are written inside the package folders.
Paths are relative to the repository root unless you use absolute paths.
ControlIdPolicyPrefix: Prefix used ONLY for Azure Policy displayName (human-readable). It is NOT used for package folder names, ZIP names, contentUri, or any other identifiers.
